ko: 남자애들과 대화할 때 올바른 방법을 가르쳐줄게.

en: I'll teach you the proper voice When you talk to boys The ways to alert and prance
I'll show you what shoes to wear How to fix your hair Everything that really counts
To be popular I'll help you be popular
You'll hang with the right cohorts You'll be good at sports
Know the slang you've got to know So let's start
ko: 알아야 할 속어도 알게 될 거야. 그러니까 시작하자. 시작하자.

en: Cause you've got an awfully long way to go
ko: 내 솔직한 분석에 기분 나빠하지 마.

en: Don't be offended by my frank analysis Think of it as personality dialysis
ko: 내 솔직한 분석에 기분 나빠하지 마.

en: Now that I've chosen to become a pal, a sister, an advisor There's nobody wiser
Not when it comes to popular I know about popular
ko: 나는 인기 있는 것에 대해 잘 알아.

en: And with an assist from me To be who you'll be
ko: 내가 도와주면 너는 지금의 우울한 모습 대신 너가 될 수 있어.

en: Instead of dreary, who you were, well, are
